\tzpentry{ID5282}{Gravitational Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5282 introduces Gravitational Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(T_{\text{gravitational}} = (c^4/(8\pi G))(R^{\mu\nu} - \tfrac{1}{2} g^{\mu\nu} R + \Lambda g^{\mu\nu})\)
\]
